title: Chamber of Record

fields.vision: Build-authority handoff for the Chamber of Record, a lossless semantic chamber for manipulation-grammar analysis, narrative-capture detection, evidence discipline, counter-intelligence hygiene, constitutional counter-design, and proportional response planning.
fields.mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
fields.source_utilization: Discovery, creativity, systems thinking, and project generation. Use source library creativity/innovation/network sources to professionalize the project-development account. Vision: Explain Nexus and Personal OS as project-development and discovery infrastructure, not miscellaneous personal tooling. Mechanism: Extract creativity, network, learning, imagination, leadership, and project-generation mechanisms. Plan: Rewrite Nexus and planning pages around upstream/downstream project movement. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact project-method and creativity passages. Source pool: 151 deduplicated local title candidates; 154 catalogue support rows. Examples: Creativity Research; The Heritage, Creativity and Innovation Nexus. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors where available. This strengthens page vision, mechanism, source-use, plan, and gap language, but it does not certify passage-level citation support. source-library controlled content is source evidence for internal scholarship and planning; do not redistribute source files or long excerpts in the public package.
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. When to reach for this: diagnosing workplace/institutional manipulation; building defensive dossiers with provenance discipline; designing proportional-response workflows. Entry point: README.md -> docs/00_room_charter.md -> schema/canonical_schema.yaml Integration target: Murano OS graph foundation; probe/response engine; narrative drift comparator. Wire or preserve the implementation files: None — spec-level package. preview/index.html + styles.css is a static navigation shell for reviewing the handoff. Sample exports show what cluster workbooks, reform packets, and variant cards should look like.
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
fields.detailed_source_vision: Build-authority handoff for the Chamber of Record, a lossless semantic chamber for manipulation-grammar analysis, narrative-capture detection, evidence discipline, counter-intelligence hygiene, constitutional counter-design, and proportional response planning. Explicitly not a gossip archive or dashboard — it is a graph-backed chamber where every visible item must be backed by a canonical object with provenance. The room serves institutional diagnosticians, senior operators / chiefs of staff, analysts/investigators, organizational designers, founders de-corrupting governance, and individuals building self-protective dossiers in politicized environments. Intended for direct handoff to product design, UI, frontend, graph/data engineering, and research/map support.
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.
